data.body: PASS-1 review (T5c Security overlay): PASS. Trust-boundary scope gate: this is a git-backed, in-process tool with no network-reachable / multi-tenant / unauthenticated endpoint (Sigstore-keyless cross-org path is explicitly scoped OUT as optional; default is internal same-trust-domain Ed25519). The one genuinely crossed boundary — the untrusted LLM agent (lethal trifecta / prompt injection) — is already given an explicit, structurally-enforced, test-verified security contract: agent emits findings only; signing key reachable only by deterministic code; standing test audits tool-surface + key-path reachability; secret-glob deny over the git-archive snapshot; refs constrained to ancestor-of-trusted-branch; agent comments treated as egress + excluded from review-input. No grounded T5c finding.
